generated_cells.notes: Imports, WIDGETS_AVAILABLE flag, set_seed(), stable softmax(), version print.
Shared toy problem; documented column-wise convention; seeded I, W_q/W_k/W_v; shape asserts.
Markdown: QKV equations, 1/sqrt(d_k) scaling, dot vs additive.
Step-by-step b^1 with printed intermediates; exposes Q/K/V/b1/alpha1.
Interactive bar chart per query position; default plot_position(0) for Run-all.
Vectorized A/A'/O; asserts O[:,0]==b1 and A'[:,0]==alpha1; exposes A/A_prime/O.
Interactive heatmap with scaling toggle + temperature; default plot_heatmap(True,1.0).
Multi-head attention; per-head heatmaps; default plot_heads(2); shape assert vs C08 O.
Sinusoidal PE (odd-d guarded), run_attention(); equivariance demo; default plot_pe(N,True).

dependency_notes: Execution chain C02 -> C03 -> C05 -> C06 and C05 -> C08 -> {C09, C11, C13} is preserved by cell order.
C06/C09/C11/C13 each render a default (non-interactive) plot before any widget so a headless Run-all produces output even when ipywidgets is absent.
C08 reuses b1/alpha1 from C05 for the per-element vs matrix equivalence assertions.
C11 reuses Q/K/V from C08 and asserts O_multi.shape == O.shape.
assumptions: Stage 5 kernel may lack ipywidgets; cells degrade gracefully via WIDGETS_AVAILABLE and a default render.
W_O in C11 uses set_seed(1) to avoid disturbing the C03 inputs/weights seeded at set_seed(0); this is the only re-seed after C03.

d_k=3 has divisors {1,3}, so the multi-head widget offers h in {1,3}; the default plot_heads(2) demonstration is intentional and matches the stage-2/stage-3 'default 2-head' spec — note h=2 does not evenly divide d_k=3 and will raise inside multi_head_attention(2). Flagging as a potential Stage 5 failure for the verifier/fixer to reconcile (either set d_k to an even value in C03 or change the default head count).
